heading_segments.text: You don't have a sales problem.

CheckoutProblem.subheading: Every checkout friction point bleeds revenue. For most Shopify stores selling in India, these four land hardest:

items.title: Fake COD orders bleed margins
items.description: 15-30% of COD orders never get accepted. You absorb the shipping cost, packaging, and blocked inventory — every single time.
items.metric: Up to 30% of revenue at risk

items.title: Carts abandoned at the final step
items.description: A slow, form-heavy checkout turns a ready buyer into a bounce. Most stores lose the customer three fields before the payment page.

items.title: Returning customers start over every time
items.description: Loyal customers re-enter their name, address, and phone number with every order. The friction is invisible — and it's costing repeat sales.

items.title: Too many tools, too much complexity
items.description: Verification, COD management, payments, WhatsApp, chatbots — most stores patch this together with 5-8 separate tools at 2-3x the cost.

CheckoutVerification.intro: Every channel is a safety net. SMS misses? WhatsApp catches it. WhatsApp down? Voice calls them. Speed is everything? Truecaller confirms in one tap — no code, no wait.

items.title: SMS OTP
items.description: Works on every phone. No app needed, no data required — the universal fallback.

items.title: WhatsApp OTP
items.description: 98% open rate in minutes. Familiar interface customers already trust.

items.title: Email OTP
items.description: Backup when SMS fails. Reach customers on any device, anywhere.

items.title: Voice OTP
items.description: Automated call reads the code aloud. Perfect when typing isn't an option.

items.title: Truecaller
items.description: One-tap verification on 330M+ devices. No code entry, no wait time.

steps.title: Install from Shopify App Store
steps.description: One click. No developer needed. The app installs as a native checkout extension — your theme is untouched.

steps.title: Connect your MSG91 account
steps.description: Already on MSG91? Link it in seconds. New here? Sign up free — your verification credits are ready to use immediately.

steps.title: Configure your rules
steps.description: Enable channels, set partial COD amounts, activate Truecaller, and arrange your fallback order — all from a no-code dashboard.

steps.title: Watch returns fall
steps.description: Every order through your new checkout is verified. Your team ships with confidence. RTO falls. Revenue sticks.

items.quote: We were writing off 25% of our COD orders every month. Partial COD with OTP cut that to under 6% in the first week alone.
items.stat_label: COD rejection reduction in week one
items.name: Priya Mehta
items.role: Owner, Silk Lane Apparel · Surat, India

items.quote: Truecaller verify changed how our customers experience checkout. One tap, done. Mobile conversions went up 22% in the first month.

items.question: Is it really free to install?
items.answer: Yes. The app is free to install from the Shopify App Store with no monthly subscription. You only pay per verification message sent — SMS, WhatsApp, email, voice, or Truecaller — at MSG91's standard rates.

items.question: How does Truecaller verification work?
items.answer: When a customer enters their phone number at checkout, Truecaller verifies their identity in one tap — no OTP code to type. It works on 330M+ devices where Truecaller is installed, making it the fastest verification channel available.

items.question: What happens if SMS OTP fails to deliver?
items.answer: MSG91 automatically falls back to your next configured channel — WhatsApp, email, or voice call — so customers aren't stuck waiting. You set the fallback order in the dashboard with no code required.

items.question: How does partial COD work globally?
items.answer: You set a partial payment amount — a percentage or fixed fee — that customers pay upfront before the COD order is confirmed. This filters out fake orders while keeping COD accessible for genuine buyers, in any market where your store operates.

items.question: Does it work for stores outside India?
items.answer: Yes. MSG91 delivers OTPs in 190+ countries via SMS, WhatsApp, email, and voice. Truecaller verification is available where Truecaller has coverage. Partial COD and checkout rules work for any Shopify store regardless of location.

items.question: How long does setup take?
items.answer: Most stores are live in under five minutes. Install from the Shopify App Store, connect your MSG91 account, configure your verification channels and COD rules — and you're done. No developer needed.

items.question: Can I control which channels activate and when?
items.answer: Fully. From the no-code dashboard you enable or disable each channel, set partial COD amounts, activate Truecaller, and define the exact fallback order — SMS first, then WhatsApp, then voice, for example.

heading_segments.text: Your next order shouldn't come back.

CheckoutCTA.subheading: Join thousands of Shopify stores across 190+ countries cutting returns, verifying buyers, and shipping with confidence — at a price that makes every competitor uncomfortable.
